dream_text: I have an important meeting tomorrow. In the dream I was packing my bag for it and noticed my phone charger was dead. I kept trying different outlets, but nothing worked. I woke up still thinking about the meeting.

insight.notice: This stays close to tomorrow’s important meeting: your mind rehearsed getting ready and ran into a practical problem. Waking up still thinking about the meeting strengthens that direct link, without giving much reason to read more into the charger.

pattern_candidates.label: Tomorrow’s important meeting
pattern_candidates.evidence: You have an important meeting tomorrow and woke up still thinking about it.

pattern_candidates.label: Repeated attempts to solve a practical problem
pattern_candidates.evidence: You tried different outlets after noticing the phone charger was dead.
